facts.snippet: Warlocks were mages that delved too deeply into the roots of demonic power. Consumed by a lust for dark knowledge, they've tapped into chaotic magic from beyond the world. The Burning Legion now feeds them its powers, allowing them to channel destructive energies and call upon th

The Warlock is a more involved class to play. Warlocks have pets, many different spell combinations, and a reagent component requirement for some of their spells. This means that playing a Warlock takes a bit more learning than some of the more straightforward classes. The Warloc
The Warlock varies greatly between talent builds and playstyle. While one may rely on the Warlock's many DoT spells to fell a monster, another might use massive shadowbolts to destroy it.
Warlock only: bonus applies to these skills when a Warlock has invested at least one skill point, or when she has acquired them from a skill bonus or oskill .

Contents 1 Large Charm 2 Helm 2.1 Circlet 3 Amulet 4 Body armor 5 Weapon 5.1 Dagger 6 Shield 6.1 Grimoire 7 Set Bonuses
Currently there are no items of this type, excluding subtypes.
A subtype of Class specific item type. Can only be used by a Warlock . Has a single subtype: Grimoire . Currently there are no items of this type, excluding subtypes.

The Affliction effect - low to zero downtime. This is a progression of course, as you need to get ahold of the talents\equipment and spells neccessary to pull it off. The effect is noticeable though; at 15 there is downtime, at 25 there is less, at 35 there is not much at all, at

Dark Pact, Improved Lifetap, Improved Drain Life, Fel Concentration, Shadow Mastery, Death Coil, Siphon Life and Demonic Embrace combine to give almost zero downtime. Against equal or higher lvl mobs there will be times where a little rest is needed (yesterday with some adds I ha
These abilities can be supplemented with equipment and trade professions to make a completely self sustaining character.

title_path: Rain Annihilation in Reign of the Warlock
facts.snippet: Well-versed in the sinister magic of demon binding, the Warlock harnesses their forbidden art to wield these demons as tools of destruction against all who oppose them. The Warlock can specialize in one of the three skill trees: demonic binding, eldritch weapons, and arts of chaos. Demon Demonic binding skills enable the Warlock to enslave demons to their will and use it to fight alongside it as an ally in battle. Th

title_path: Rain Annihilation in Reign of the Warlock
facts.snippet: Demonic binding skills enable the Warlock to enslave demons to their will and use it to fight alongside it as an ally in battle. The Warlock can summon: Goatmen Tainted Defiler Each demon has its own abilities and strengths and can be enhanced by the Warlock’s skills. A Warlock who masters this art can either bind any demon he encounters in battle or consume his enslaved demon and drain its life force to augment his

title_path: Rain Annihilation in Reign of the Warlock
facts.snippet: Well-versed in the sinister magic of demon binding, the Warlock harnesses their forbidden art to wield these demons as tools of destruction against all who oppose them. The Warlock can specialize in one of the three skill trees: demonic binding, eldritch weapons, and arts of chaos. Demon Demonic binding skills enable the Warlock to enslave demons to their will and use it to fight alongside it as an ally in battle. Th

title_path: Rain Annihilation in Reign of the Warlock
facts.snippet: Demonic binding skills enable the Warlock to enslave demons to their will and use it to fight alongside it as an ally in battle. The Warlock can summon: Goatmen Tainted Defiler Each demon has its own abilities and strengths and can be enhanced by the Warlock’s skills. A Warlock who masters this art can either bind any demon he encounters in battle or consume his enslaved demon and drain its life force to augment his

facts.snippet: Whether an affix can spawn depends on the item's affix level (alvl), derived from ilvl and base item's qlvl, and compared against the affix's required level.

Crafted item ilvl is computed from character level and input item ilvl.
Formula: crafted_ilvl = floor(0.5 * clvl) + floor(0.5 * ilvl)

facts.snippet: Magic Find affects the chance for an item to be Unique/Set/Rare/Magic, but does not directly change which base item (or Treasure Class selection) drops.

Effective MF for Unique has diminishing returns.
Formula: EffectiveMF_unique = (MF * 250) / (MF + 250)

facts.snippet: Treasure Class selection determines the drop entry/base item pool before quality (unique/set/rare/magic) is applied.
Magic Find affects the chance for an item to be Unique/Set/Rare/Magic, but does not directly change which base item (or Treasure Class selection) drops.

facts.snippet: Whether an affix can spawn depends on the item's affix level (alvl), derived from ilvl and base item's qlvl, and compared against the affix's required level.

Crafted item ilvl is computed from character level and input item ilvl.
Formula: crafted_ilvl = floor(0.5 * clvl) + floor(0.5 * ilvl)

A Grand Charm must have sufficiently high ilvl (e.g., from Baal/Diablo/Nihlathak) to reach the affix level required for the 41-45 Life suffix (of Vita).
Formula: (high ilvl) -> high alvl -> allows Vita(41-45 life) suffix

facts.snippet: Whether an affix can spawn depends on the item's affix level (alvl), derived from ilvl and base item's qlvl, and compared against the affix's required level.

Crafted item ilvl is computed from character level and input item ilvl.
Formula: crafted_ilvl = floor(0.5 * clvl) + floor(0.5 * ilvl)

A Grand Charm must have sufficiently high ilvl (e.g., from Baal/Diablo/Nihlathak) to reach the affix level required for the 41-45 Life suffix (of Vita).
Formula: (high ilvl) -> high alvl -> allows Vita(41-45 life) suffix

facts.snippet: Treasure Class selection determines the drop entry/base item pool before quality (unique/set/rare/magic) is applied.
The Countess has a special rune drop table independent of her item drop table. In Hell, she can drop runes up to Lo, but her special table only goes up to Ist. Common source for runes below Ist.
In Hell difficulty, The Countess is always Fire and Cold Immune.

facts.snippet:
Nihlathak uses Corpse Explosion (CE) which deals 10-20% of the corpse's maximum life as Physical and Fire damage. This is the primary danger when farming him.
Formula: 50% Physical + 50% Fire damage

Nihlathak's Corpse Explosion (CE) deals 50% physical and 50% fire damage based on the corpse's base hit points. In Hell, this damage is extremely lethal. Using 'Slain Monsters Rest in Peace' (e.g., from Nature's Peace) prevents him from using it.

facts.snippet:
To enter the Secret Cow Level, transmute Wirt's Leg and a Tome of Town Portal in the Horadric Cube while in the Rogue Encampment (Act 1).
Formula: Wirt's Leg + Tome of Town Portal = Red Portal

In Diablo II: Resurrected, killing the Cow King no longer prevents the player from opening the Secret Cow Level portal in the same difficulty. This is a significant quality-of-life change from legacy Diablo II.

facts.snippet:
Nihlathak uses Corpse Explosion (CE) which deals 10-20% of the corpse's maximum life as Physical and Fire damage. This is the primary danger when farming him.
Formula: 50% Physical + 50% Fire damage

Nihlathak's Corpse Explosion (CE) deals 50% physical and 50% fire damage based on the corpse's base hit points. In Hell, this damage is extremely lethal. Using 'Slain Monsters Rest in Peace' (e.g., from Nature's Peace) prevents him from using it.
When Shenk the Overseer dies, a series of catapult shots rain down on his location, killing all nearby monsters. This 'death event' is purely cosmetic for players but clears the immediate area.

facts.snippet: The Countess has a special rune drop table independent of her item drop table. In Hell, she can drop runes up to Lo, but her special table only goes up to Ist. Common source for runes below Ist.
In Hell difficulty, The Countess is always Fire and Cold Immune.
Treasure Class selection determines the drop entry/base item pool before quality (unique/set/rare/magic) is applied.

facts.snippet:
Andariel has a base -50% Fire Resistance in all difficulties, making fire damage particularly effective against her.
Formula: Fire Resistance = -50%
Duriel is notorious for dropping multiple Town Portal scrolls, but in Hell difficulty, he remains a significant source for high-end unique jewelry and charms.
Baal summons Festering Appendages to distract and mana-burn players. They are secondary targets that can clutter the battlefield.

facts.snippet: The Moat Trick involves luring Mephisto to the edge of the moat in Durance of Hate Level 3, where he can be attacked from a distance while his AI fails to reach the player. This remains effective in D2R.
Hephasto drops the Hellforge Hammer required for the Act 4 quest. He is always Spectral Hit and has a high chance of having damaging Auras like Fanaticism or Conviction due to his boss modifiers.

facts.snippet:
Nihlathak uses Corpse Explosion (CE) which deals 10-20% of the corpse's maximum life as Physical and Fire damage. This is the primary danger when farming him.
Formula: 50% Physical + 50% Fire damage

Nihlathak's Corpse Explosion (CE) deals 50% physical and 50% fire damage based on the corpse's base hit points. In Hell, this damage is extremely lethal. Using 'Slain Monsters Rest in Peace' (e.g., from Nature's Peace) prevents him from using it.
When Shenk the Overseer dies, a series of catapult shots rain down on his location, killing all nearby monsters. This 'death event' is purely cosmetic for players but clears the immediate area.

facts.snippet:
To enter the Secret Cow Level, transmute Wirt's Leg and a Tome of Town Portal in the Horadric Cube while in the Rogue Encampment (Act 1).
Formula: Wirt's Leg + Tome of Town Portal = Red Portal

In Diablo II: Resurrected, killing the Cow King no longer prevents the player from opening the Secret Cow Level portal in the same difficulty. This is a significant quality-of-life change from legacy Diablo II.

Cow King's Leathers is a 3-piece set with notable MF bonus. Pieces: Cow King's Horns (War Hat), Cow King's Hide (Embossed Plate), Cow King's Hooves (Heavy Boots). 3-piece set bonus: +100% Magic Find, +5 Life per Kill. Cow King can be killed with set equipped to prevent 'killing the cow king bug' (red portal lockout). In D2R the portal lockout mechanics still apply — killing Cow King can lock out current game's portal but not future games.

facts.snippet: The Countess has a special rune drop table independent of her item drop table. In Hell, she can drop runes up to Lo, but her special table only goes up to Ist. Common source for runes below Ist.
In Hell difficulty, The Countess is always Fire and Cold Immune.

Ber (rune 30) can drop from Hell Hellforge (guaranteed Hel-Gul range, rarely higher), Hell Countess (max Ist), or monster drops in Hell areas with TC87 potential. Best reliable sources: 大量刷普通怪 in Chaos Sanctuary or Worldstone Keep, or trading. ilvl of area must support the TC.

Ber (rune 30) can drop from Hell Hellforge (guaranteed Hel-Gul range, rarely higher), Hell Countess (max Ist), or monster drops in Hell areas with TC87 potential. Best reliable sources: 大量刷普通怪 in Chaos Sanctuary or Worldstone Keep, or trading. ilvl of area must support the TC.

facts.snippet:
Andariel has a base -50% Fire Resistance in all difficulties, making fire damage particularly effective against her.
Formula: Fire Resistance = -50%

Andariel's Visage is a Unique Demonhead. qlvl: 83. Key mods: +2 All Skills, 20% IAS, +25-30 Strength, Life Leech 8-10%, Level 3 Poison Nova on Hit, -30% Fire Resistance. Best in slot for many melee/hybrid builds for IAS + skills + leech combo.
Duriel is notorious for dropping multiple Town Portal scrolls, but in Hell difficulty, he remains a significant source for high-end unique jewelry and charms.

facts.snippet: The Moat Trick involves luring Mephisto to the edge of the moat in Durance of Hate Level 3, where he can be attacked from a distance while his AI fails to reach the player. This remains effective in D2R.
Hephasto drops the Hellforge Hammer required for the Act 4 quest. He is always Spectral Hit and has a high chance of having damaging Auras like Fanaticism or Conviction due to his boss modifiers.

Griswold's Legacy is a 4-piece Paladin set. Pieces: Griswold's Redemption (Caduceus), Griswold's Honor (Vortex Shield), Griswold's Valor (Corona), Griswold's Heart (Ornate Plate). Full set bonus: +3 Combat Skills (Paladin), +20 FCR, +20 FHR, +2 to Prayer. The Vortex Shield alone is sought for max block + sockets base.

facts.snippet:
Nihlathak uses Corpse Explosion (CE) which deals 10-20% of the corpse's maximum life as Physical and Fire damage. This is the primary danger when farming him.
Formula: 50% Physical + 50% Fire damage

Nihlathak's Corpse Explosion (CE) deals 50% physical and 50% fire damage based on the corpse's base hit points. In Hell, this damage is extremely lethal. Using 'Slain Monsters Rest in Peace' (e.g., from Nature's Peace) prevents him from using it.
When Shenk the Overseer dies, a series of catapult shots rain down on his location, killing all nearby monsters. This 'death event' is purely cosmetic for players but clears the immediate area.

facts.snippet:
To enter the Secret Cow Level, transmute Wirt's Leg and a Tome of Town Portal in the Horadric Cube while in the Rogue Encampment (Act 1).
Formula: Wirt's Leg + Tome of Town Portal = Red Portal

In Diablo II: Resurrected, killing the Cow King no longer prevents the player from opening the Secret Cow Level portal in the same difficulty. This is a significant quality-of-life change from legacy Diablo II.

Cow King's Leathers is a 3-piece set with notable MF bonus. Pieces: Cow King's Horns (War Hat), Cow King's Hide (Embossed Plate), Cow King's Hooves (Heavy Boots). 3-piece set bonus: +100% Magic Find, +5 Life per Kill. Cow King can be killed with set equipped to prevent 'killing the cow king bug' (red portal lockout). In D2R the portal lockout mechanics still apply — killing Cow King can lock out current game's portal but not future games.

facts.snippet: The Countess has a special rune drop table independent of her item drop table. In Hell, she can drop runes up to Lo, but her special table only goes up to Ist. Common source for runes below Ist.
In Hell difficulty, The Countess is always Fire and Cold Immune.

Ber (rune 30) can drop from Hell Hellforge (guaranteed Hel-Gul range, rarely higher), Hell Countess (max Ist), or monster drops in Hell areas with TC87 potential. Best reliable sources: 大量刷普通怪 in Chaos Sanctuary or Worldstone Keep, or trading. ilvl of area must support the TC.

facts.snippet:
Andariel has a base -50% Fire Resistance in all difficulties, making fire damage particularly effective against her.
Formula: Fire Resistance = -50%

Andariel's Visage is a Unique Demonhead. qlvl: 83. Key mods: +2 All Skills, 20% IAS, +25-30 Strength, Life Leech 8-10%, Level 3 Poison Nova on Hit, -30% Fire Resistance. Best in slot for many melee/hybrid builds for IAS + skills + leech combo.
Duriel is notorious for dropping multiple Town Portal scrolls, but in Hell difficulty, he remains a significant source for high-end unique jewelry and charms.

facts.snippet: The Moat Trick involves luring Mephisto to the edge of the moat in Durance of Hate Level 3, where he can be attacked from a distance while his AI fails to reach the player. This remains effective in D2R.
Hephasto drops the Hellforge Hammer required for the Act 4 quest. He is always Spectral Hit and has a high chance of having damaging Auras like Fanaticism or Conviction due to his boss modifiers.

Griswold's Legacy is a 4-piece Paladin set. Pieces: Griswold's Redemption (Caduceus), Griswold's Honor (Vortex Shield), Griswold's Valor (Corona), Griswold's Heart (Ornate Plate). Full set bonus: +3 Combat Skills (Paladin), +20 FCR, +20 FHR, +2 to Prayer. The Vortex Shield alone is sought for max block + sockets base.

facts.snippet:
Nihlathak uses Corpse Explosion (CE) which deals 10-20% of the corpse's maximum life as Physical and Fire damage. This is the primary danger when farming him.
Formula: 50% Physical + 50% Fire damage

Nihlathak's Corpse Explosion (CE) deals 50% physical and 50% fire damage based on the corpse's base hit points. In Hell, this damage is extremely lethal. Using 'Slain Monsters Rest in Peace' (e.g., from Nature's Peace) prevents him from using it.
When Shenk the Overseer dies, a series of catapult shots rain down on his location, killing all nearby monsters. This 'death event' is purely cosmetic for players but clears the immediate area.

facts.snippet:
To enter the Secret Cow Level, transmute Wirt's Leg and a Tome of Town Portal in the Horadric Cube while in the Rogue Encampment (Act 1).
Formula: Wirt's Leg + Tome of Town Portal = Red Portal

In Diablo II: Resurrected, killing the Cow King no longer prevents the player from opening the Secret Cow Level portal in the same difficulty. This is a significant quality-of-life change from legacy Diablo II.

Cow King's Leathers is a 3-piece set with notable MF bonus. Pieces: Cow King's Horns (War Hat), Cow King's Hide (Embossed Plate), Cow King's Hooves (Heavy Boots). 3-piece set bonus: +100% Magic Find, +5 Life per Kill. Cow King can be killed with set equipped to prevent 'killing the cow king bug' (red portal lockout). In D2R the portal lockout mechanics still apply — killing Cow King can lock out current game's portal but not future games.

facts.snippet: The Countess has a special rune drop table independent of her item drop table. In Hell, she can drop runes up to Lo, but her special table only goes up to Ist. Common source for runes below Ist.
In Hell difficulty, The Countess is always Fire and Cold Immune.

Ber (rune 30) can drop from Hell Hellforge (guaranteed Hel-Gul range, rarely higher), Hell Countess (max Ist), or monster drops in Hell areas with TC87 potential. Best reliable sources: 大量刷普通怪 in Chaos Sanctuary or Worldstone Keep, or trading. ilvl of area must support the TC.

facts.snippet:
Andariel has a base -50% Fire Resistance in all difficulties, making fire damage particularly effective against her.
Formula: Fire Resistance = -50%

Andariel's Visage is a Unique Demonhead. qlvl: 83. Key mods: +2 All Skills, 20% IAS, +25-30 Strength, Life Leech 8-10%, Level 3 Poison Nova on Hit, -30% Fire Resistance. Best in slot for many melee/hybrid builds for IAS + skills + leech combo.
Duriel is notorious for dropping multiple Town Portal scrolls, but in Hell difficulty, he remains a significant source for high-end unique jewelry and charms.

facts.snippet: The Moat Trick involves luring Mephisto to the edge of the moat in Durance of Hate Level 3, where he can be attacked from a distance while his AI fails to reach the player. This remains effective in D2R.
Hephasto drops the Hellforge Hammer required for the Act 4 quest. He is always Spectral Hit and has a high chance of having damaging Auras like Fanaticism or Conviction due to his boss modifiers.

Griswold's Legacy is a 4-piece Paladin set. Pieces: Griswold's Redemption (Caduceus), Griswold's Honor (Vortex Shield), Griswold's Valor (Corona), Griswold's Heart (Ornate Plate). Full set bonus: +3 Combat Skills (Paladin), +20 FCR, +20 FHR, +2 to Prayer. The Vortex Shield alone is sought for max block + sockets base.

facts.snippet:
Nihlathak uses Corpse Explosion (CE) which deals 10-20% of the corpse's maximum life as Physical and Fire damage. This is the primary danger when farming him.
Formula: 50% Physical + 50% Fire damage

Nihlathak's Corpse Explosion (CE) deals 50% physical and 50% fire damage based on the corpse's base hit points. In Hell, this damage is extremely lethal. Using 'Slain Monsters Rest in Peace' (e.g., from Nature's Peace) prevents him from using it.
When Shenk the Overseer dies, a series of catapult shots rain down on his location, killing all nearby monsters. This 'death event' is purely cosmetic for players but clears the immediate area.

facts.snippet:
To enter the Secret Cow Level, transmute Wirt's Leg and a Tome of Town Portal in the Horadric Cube while in the Rogue Encampment (Act 1).
Formula: Wirt's Leg + Tome of Town Portal = Red Portal

In Diablo II: Resurrected, killing the Cow King no longer prevents the player from opening the Secret Cow Level portal in the same difficulty. This is a significant quality-of-life change from legacy Diablo II.

Cow King's Leathers is a 3-piece set with notable MF bonus. Pieces: Cow King's Horns (War Hat), Cow King's Hide (Embossed Plate), Cow King's Hooves (Heavy Boots). 3-piece set bonus: +100% Magic Find, +5 Life per Kill. Cow King can be killed with set equipped to prevent 'killing the cow king bug' (red portal lockout). In D2R the portal lockout mechanics still apply — killing Cow King can lock out current game's portal but not future games.

facts.snippet: The Countess has a special rune drop table independent of her item drop table. In Hell, she can drop runes up to Lo, but her special table only goes up to Ist. Common source for runes below Ist.
In Hell difficulty, The Countess is always Fire and Cold Immune.

Ber (rune 30) can drop from Hell Hellforge (guaranteed Hel-Gul range, rarely higher), Hell Countess (max Ist), or monster drops in Hell areas with TC87 potential. Best reliable sources: 大量刷普通怪 in Chaos Sanctuary or Worldstone Keep, or trading. ilvl of area must support the TC.

facts.snippet:
Andariel has a base -50% Fire Resistance in all difficulties, making fire damage particularly effective against her.
Formula: Fire Resistance = -50%

Andariel's Visage is a Unique Demonhead. qlvl: 83. Key mods: +2 All Skills, 20% IAS, +25-30 Strength, Life Leech 8-10%, Level 3 Poison Nova on Hit, -30% Fire Resistance. Best in slot for many melee/hybrid builds for IAS + skills + leech combo.
Duriel is notorious for dropping multiple Town Portal scrolls, but in Hell difficulty, he remains a significant source for high-end unique jewelry and charms.

facts.snippet: The Moat Trick involves luring Mephisto to the edge of the moat in Durance of Hate Level 3, where he can be attacked from a distance while his AI fails to reach the player. This remains effective in D2R.

Bul-Kathos' Wedding Band is a Unique Ring. Key mods: +1 to All Skills, +0.5 Life per Character Level, +50 Life, 3-5% Life Stolen per Hit. qlvl: 85. Top tier ring for melee builds needing life leech and skills.
Hephasto drops the Hellforge Hammer required for the Act 4 quest. He is always Spectral Hit and has a high chance of having damaging Auras like Fanaticism or Conviction due to his boss modifiers.

facts.snippet:
Nihlathak uses Corpse Explosion (CE) which deals 10-20% of the corpse's maximum life as Physical and Fire damage. This is the primary danger when farming him.
Formula: 50% Physical + 50% Fire damage

Nihlathak's Corpse Explosion (CE) deals 50% physical and 50% fire damage based on the corpse's base hit points. In Hell, this damage is extremely lethal. Using 'Slain Monsters Rest in Peace' (e.g., from Nature's Peace) prevents him from using it.
When Shenk the Overseer dies, a series of catapult shots rain down on his location, killing all nearby monsters. This 'death event' is purely cosmetic for players but clears the immediate area.

facts.snippet:
To enter the Secret Cow Level, transmute Wirt's Leg and a Tome of Town Portal in the Horadric Cube while in the Rogue Encampment (Act 1).
Formula: Wirt's Leg + Tome of Town Portal = Red Portal

In Diablo II: Resurrected, killing the Cow King no longer prevents the player from opening the Secret Cow Level portal in the same difficulty. This is a significant quality-of-life change from legacy Diablo II.

Cow King's Leathers is a 3-piece set with notable MF bonus. Pieces: Cow King's Horns (War Hat), Cow King's Hide (Embossed Plate), Cow King's Hooves (Heavy Boots). 3-piece set bonus: +100% Magic Find, +5 Life per Kill. Cow King can be killed with set equipped to prevent 'killing the cow king bug' (red portal lockout). In D2R the portal lockout mechanics still apply — killing Cow King can lock out current game's portal but not future games.

facts.snippet: The Countess has a special rune drop table independent of her item drop table. In Hell, she can drop runes up to Lo, but her special table only goes up to Ist. Common source for runes below Ist.
In Hell difficulty, The Countess is always Fire and Cold Immune.

Ber (rune 30) can drop from Hell Hellforge (guaranteed Hel-Gul range, rarely higher), Hell Countess (max Ist), or monster drops in Hell areas with TC87 potential. Best reliable sources: 大量刷普通怪 in Chaos Sanctuary or Worldstone Keep, or trading. ilvl of area must support the TC.

facts.snippet:
Andariel has a base -50% Fire Resistance in all difficulties, making fire damage particularly effective against her.
Formula: Fire Resistance = -50%

Andariel's Visage is a Unique Demonhead. qlvl: 83. Key mods: +2 All Skills, 20% IAS, +25-30 Strength, Life Leech 8-10%, Level 3 Poison Nova on Hit, -30% Fire Resistance. Best in slot for many melee/hybrid builds for IAS + skills + leech combo.
Duriel is notorious for dropping multiple Town Portal scrolls, but in Hell difficulty, he remains a significant source for high-end unique jewelry and charms.

facts.snippet: The Moat Trick involves luring Mephisto to the edge of the moat in Durance of Hate Level 3, where he can be attacked from a distance while his AI fails to reach the player. This remains effective in D2R.

Bul-Kathos' Wedding Band is a Unique Ring. Key mods: +1 to All Skills, +0.5 Life per Character Level, +50 Life, 3-5% Life Stolen per Hit. qlvl: 85. Top tier ring for melee builds needing life leech and skills.
Hephasto drops the Hellforge Hammer required for the Act 4 quest. He is always Spectral Hit and has a high chance of having damaging Auras like Fanaticism or Conviction due to his boss modifiers.

facts.snippet:
Nihlathak uses Corpse Explosion (CE) which deals 10-20% of the corpse's maximum life as Physical and Fire damage. This is the primary danger when farming him.
Formula: 50% Physical + 50% Fire damage

Nihlathak's Corpse Explosion (CE) deals 50% physical and 50% fire damage based on the corpse's base hit points. In Hell, this damage is extremely lethal. Using 'Slain Monsters Rest in Peace' (e.g., from Nature's Peace) prevents him from using it.
When Shenk the Overseer dies, a series of catapult shots rain down on his location, killing all nearby monsters. This 'death event' is purely cosmetic for players but clears the immediate area.

facts.snippet:
To enter the Secret Cow Level, transmute Wirt's Leg and a Tome of Town Portal in the Horadric Cube while in the Rogue Encampment (Act 1).
Formula: Wirt's Leg + Tome of Town Portal = Red Portal

In Diablo II: Resurrected, killing the Cow King no longer prevents the player from opening the Secret Cow Level portal in the same difficulty. This is a significant quality-of-life change from legacy Diablo II.

Cow King's Leathers is a 3-piece set with notable MF bonus. Pieces: Cow King's Horns (War Hat), Cow King's Hide (Embossed Plate), Cow King's Hooves (Heavy Boots). 3-piece set bonus: +100% Magic Find, +5 Life per Kill. Cow King can be killed with set equipped to prevent 'killing the cow king bug' (red portal lockout). In D2R the portal lockout mechanics still apply — killing Cow King can lock out current game's portal but not future games.

facts.snippet: The Countess has a special rune drop table independent of her item drop table. In Hell, she can drop runes up to Lo, but her special table only goes up to Ist. Common source for runes below Ist.
In Hell difficulty, The Countess is always Fire and Cold Immune.

Ber (rune 30) can drop from Hell Hellforge (guaranteed Hel-Gul range, rarely higher), Hell Countess (max Ist), or monster drops in Hell areas with TC87 potential. Best reliable sources: 大量刷普通怪 in Chaos Sanctuary or Worldstone Keep, or trading. ilvl of area must support the TC.

facts.snippet:
Andariel has a base -50% Fire Resistance in all difficulties, making fire damage particularly effective against her.
Formula: Fire Resistance = -50%

Andariel's Visage is a Unique Demonhead. qlvl: 83. Key mods: +2 All Skills, 20% IAS, +25-30 Strength, Life Leech 8-10%, Level 3 Poison Nova on Hit, -30% Fire Resistance. Best in slot for many melee/hybrid builds for IAS + skills + leech combo.
Duriel is notorious for dropping multiple Town Portal scrolls, but in Hell difficulty, he remains a significant source for high-end unique jewelry and charms.

facts.snippet: The Moat Trick involves luring Mephisto to the edge of the moat in Durance of Hate Level 3, where he can be attacked from a distance while his AI fails to reach the player. This remains effective in D2R.

Bul-Kathos' Wedding Band is a Unique Ring. Key mods: +1 to All Skills, +0.5 Life per Character Level, +50 Life, 3-5% Life Stolen per Hit. qlvl: 85. Top tier ring for melee builds needing life leech and skills.
Hephasto drops the Hellforge Hammer required for the Act 4 quest. He is always Spectral Hit and has a high chance of having damaging Auras like Fanaticism or Conviction due to his boss modifiers.

facts.snippet:
Nihlathak uses Corpse Explosion (CE) which deals 10-20% of the corpse's maximum life as Physical and Fire damage. This is the primary danger when farming him.
Formula: 50% Physical + 50% Fire damage

Nihlathak's Corpse Explosion (CE) deals 50% physical and 50% fire damage based on the corpse's base hit points. In Hell, this damage is extremely lethal. Using 'Slain Monsters Rest in Peace' (e.g., from Nature's Peace) prevents him from using it.
When Shenk the Overseer dies, a series of catapult shots rain down on his location, killing all nearby monsters. This 'death event' is purely cosmetic for players but clears the immediate area.

facts.snippet:
To enter the Secret Cow Level, transmute Wirt's Leg and a Tome of Town Portal in the Horadric Cube while in the Rogue Encampment (Act 1).
Formula: Wirt's Leg + Tome of Town Portal = Red Portal

In Diablo II: Resurrected, killing the Cow King no longer prevents the player from opening the Secret Cow Level portal in the same difficulty. This is a significant quality-of-life change from legacy Diablo II.

Cow King's Leathers is a 3-piece set with notable MF bonus. Pieces: Cow King's Horns (War Hat), Cow King's Hide (Embossed Plate), Cow King's Hooves (Heavy Boots). 3-piece set bonus: +100% Magic Find, +5 Life per Kill. Cow King can be killed with set equipped to prevent 'killing the cow king bug' (red portal lockout). In D2R the portal lockout mechanics still apply — killing Cow King can lock out current game's portal but not future games.

facts.snippet: The Countess has a special rune drop table independent of her item drop table. In Hell, she can drop runes up to Lo, but her special table only goes up to Ist. Common source for runes below Ist.
In Hell difficulty, The Countess is always Fire and Cold Immune.

Ber (rune 30) can drop from Hell Hellforge (guaranteed Hel-Gul range, rarely higher), Hell Countess (max Ist), or monster drops in Hell areas with TC87 potential. Best reliable sources: 大量刷普通怪 in Chaos Sanctuary or Worldstone Keep, or trading. ilvl of area must support the TC.

facts.snippet:
Andariel has a base -50% Fire Resistance in all difficulties, making fire damage particularly effective against her.
Formula: Fire Resistance = -50%

Andariel's Visage is a Unique Demonhead. qlvl: 83. Key mods: +2 All Skills, 20% IAS, +25-30 Strength, Life Leech 8-10%, Level 3 Poison Nova on Hit, -30% Fire Resistance. Best in slot for many melee/hybrid builds for IAS + skills + leech combo.
Duriel is notorious for dropping multiple Town Portal scrolls, but in Hell difficulty, he remains a significant source for high-end unique jewelry and charms.

facts.snippet: The Moat Trick involves luring Mephisto to the edge of the moat in Durance of Hate Level 3, where he can be attacked from a distance while his AI fails to reach the player. This remains effective in D2R.

Bul-Kathos' Wedding Band is a Unique Ring. Key mods: +1 to All Skills, +0.5 Life per Character Level, +50 Life, 3-5% Life Stolen per Hit. qlvl: 85. Top tier ring for melee builds needing life leech and skills.
Hephasto drops the Hellforge Hammer required for the Act 4 quest. He is always Spectral Hit and has a high chance of having damaging Auras like Fanaticism or Conviction due to his boss modifiers.

facts.snippet:
Nihlathak uses Corpse Explosion (CE) which deals 10-20% of the corpse's maximum life as Physical and Fire damage. This is the primary danger when farming him.
Formula: 50% Physical + 50% Fire damage

Nihlathak's Corpse Explosion (CE) deals 50% physical and 50% fire damage based on the corpse's base hit points. In Hell, this damage is extremely lethal. Using 'Slain Monsters Rest in Peace' (e.g., from Nature's Peace) prevents him from using it.
When Shenk the Overseer dies, a series of catapult shots rain down on his location, killing all nearby monsters. This 'death event' is purely cosmetic for players but clears the immediate area.

facts.snippet:
To enter the Secret Cow Level, transmute Wirt's Leg and a Tome of Town Portal in the Horadric Cube while in the Rogue Encampment (Act 1).
Formula: Wirt's Leg + Tome of Town Portal = Red Portal

In Diablo II: Resurrected, killing the Cow King no longer prevents the player from opening the Secret Cow Level portal in the same difficulty. This is a significant quality-of-life change from legacy Diablo II.

Cow King's Leathers is a 3-piece set with notable MF bonus. Pieces: Cow King's Horns (War Hat), Cow King's Hide (Embossed Plate), Cow King's Hooves (Heavy Boots). 3-piece set bonus: +100% Magic Find, +5 Life per Kill. Cow King can be killed with set equipped to prevent 'killing the cow king bug' (red portal lockout). In D2R the portal lockout mechanics still apply — killing Cow King can lock out current game's portal but not future games.

facts.snippet: The Countess has a special rune drop table independent of her item drop table. In Hell, she can drop runes up to Lo, but her special table only goes up to Ist. Common source for runes below Ist.
In Hell difficulty, The Countess is always Fire and Cold Immune.

Ber (rune 30) can drop from Hell Hellforge (guaranteed Hel-Gul range, rarely higher), Hell Countess (max Ist), or monster drops in Hell areas with TC87 potential. Best reliable sources: 大量刷普通怪 in Chaos Sanctuary or Worldstone Keep, or trading. ilvl of area must support the TC.

facts.snippet:
Andariel has a base -50% Fire Resistance in all difficulties, making fire damage particularly effective against her.
Formula: Fire Resistance = -50%

Andariel's Visage is a Unique Demonhead. qlvl: 83. Key mods: +2 All Skills, 20% IAS, +25-30 Strength, Life Leech 8-10%, Level 3 Poison Nova on Hit, -30% Fire Resistance. Best in slot for many melee/hybrid builds for IAS + skills + leech combo.
Duriel is notorious for dropping multiple Town Portal scrolls, but in Hell difficulty, he remains a significant source for high-end unique jewelry and charms.

facts.snippet: The Moat Trick involves luring Mephisto to the edge of the moat in Durance of Hate Level 3, where he can be attacked from a distance while his AI fails to reach the player. This remains effective in D2R.

Bul-Kathos' Wedding Band is a Unique Ring. Key mods: +1 to All Skills, +0.5 Life per Character Level, +50 Life, 3-5% Life Stolen per Hit. qlvl: 85. Top tier ring for melee builds needing life leech and skills.
Hephasto drops the Hellforge Hammer required for the Act 4 quest. He is always Spectral Hit and has a high chance of having damaging Auras like Fanaticism or Conviction due to his boss modifiers.

facts.snippet:
Nihlathak uses Corpse Explosion (CE) which deals 10-20% of the corpse's maximum life as Physical and Fire damage. This is the primary danger when farming him.
Formula: 50% Physical + 50% Fire damage

Nihlathak's Corpse Explosion (CE) deals 50% physical and 50% fire damage based on the corpse's base hit points. In Hell, this damage is extremely lethal. Using 'Slain Monsters Rest in Peace' (e.g., from Nature's Peace) prevents him from using it.
When Shenk the Overseer dies, a series of catapult shots rain down on his location, killing all nearby monsters. This 'death event' is purely cosmetic for players but clears the immediate area.

facts.snippet:
To enter the Secret Cow Level, transmute Wirt's Leg and a Tome of Town Portal in the Horadric Cube while in the Rogue Encampment (Act 1).
Formula: Wirt's Leg + Tome of Town Portal = Red Portal

In Diablo II: Resurrected, killing the Cow King no longer prevents the player from opening the Secret Cow Level portal in the same difficulty. This is a significant quality-of-life change from legacy Diablo II.

Cow King's Leathers is a 3-piece set with notable MF bonus. Pieces: Cow King's Horns (War Hat), Cow King's Hide (Embossed Plate), Cow King's Hooves (Heavy Boots). 3-piece set bonus: +100% Magic Find, +5 Life per Kill. Cow King can be killed with set equipped to prevent 'killing the cow king bug' (red portal lockout). In D2R the portal lockout mechanics still apply — killing Cow King can lock out current game's portal but not future games.

facts.snippet: The Countess has a special rune drop table independent of her item drop table. In Hell, she can drop runes up to Lo, but her special table only goes up to Ist. Common source for runes below Ist.
In Hell difficulty, The Countess is always Fire and Cold Immune.

Ber (rune 30) can drop from Hell Hellforge (guaranteed Hel-Gul range, rarely higher), Hell Countess (max Ist), or monster drops in Hell areas with TC87 potential. Best reliable sources: 大量刷普通怪 in Chaos Sanctuary or Worldstone Keep, or trading. ilvl of area must support the TC.

facts.snippet:
Andariel has a base -50% Fire Resistance in all difficulties, making fire damage particularly effective against her.
Formula: Fire Resistance = -50%

Andariel's Visage is a Unique Demonhead. qlvl: 83. Key mods: +2 All Skills, 20% IAS, +25-30 Strength, Life Leech 8-10%, Level 3 Poison Nova on Hit, -30% Fire Resistance. Best in slot for many melee/hybrid builds for IAS + skills + leech combo.
Duriel is notorious for dropping multiple Town Portal scrolls, but in Hell difficulty, he remains a significant source for high-end unique jewelry and charms.

facts.snippet: The Moat Trick involves luring Mephisto to the edge of the moat in Durance of Hate Level 3, where he can be attacked from a distance while his AI fails to reach the player. This remains effective in D2R.

Bul-Kathos' Wedding Band is a Unique Ring. Key mods: +1 to All Skills, +0.5 Life per Character Level, +50 Life, 3-5% Life Stolen per Hit. qlvl: 85. Top tier ring for melee builds needing life leech and skills.
Hephasto drops the Hellforge Hammer required for the Act 4 quest. He is always Spectral Hit and has a high chance of having damaging Auras like Fanaticism or Conviction due to his boss modifiers.

A Grand Charm must have sufficiently high ilvl (e.g., from Baal/Diablo/Nihlathak) to reach the affix level required for the 41-45 Life suffix (of Vita).
Formula: (high ilvl) -> high alvl -> allows Vita(41-45 life) suffix

facts.snippet:
Nihlathak uses Corpse Explosion (CE) which deals 10-20% of the corpse's maximum life as Physical and Fire damage. This is the primary danger when farming him.
Formula: 50% Physical + 50% Fire damage

Nihlathak's Corpse Explosion (CE) deals 50% physical and 50% fire damage based on the corpse's base hit points. In Hell, this damage is extremely lethal. Using 'Slain Monsters Rest in Peace' (e.g., from Nature's Peace) prevents him from using it.
When Shenk the Overseer dies, a series of catapult shots rain down on his location, killing all nearby monsters. This 'death event' is purely cosmetic for players but clears the immediate area.

facts.snippet:
To enter the Secret Cow Level, transmute Wirt's Leg and a Tome of Town Portal in the Horadric Cube while in the Rogue Encampment (Act 1).
Formula: Wirt's Leg + Tome of Town Portal = Red Portal

In Diablo II: Resurrected, killing the Cow King no longer prevents the player from opening the Secret Cow Level portal in the same difficulty. This is a significant quality-of-life change from legacy Diablo II.

Cow King's Leathers is a 3-piece set with notable MF bonus. Pieces: Cow King's Horns (War Hat), Cow King's Hide (Embossed Plate), Cow King's Hooves (Heavy Boots). 3-piece set bonus: +100% Magic Find, +5 Life per Kill. Cow King can be killed with set equipped to prevent 'killing the cow king bug' (red portal lockout). In D2R the portal lockout mechanics still apply — killing Cow King can lock out current game's portal but not future games.

facts.snippet: The Countess has a special rune drop table independent of her item drop table. In Hell, she can drop runes up to Lo, but her special table only goes up to Ist. Common source for runes below Ist.
In Hell difficulty, The Countess is always Fire and Cold Immune.

Ber (rune 30) can drop from Hell Hellforge (guaranteed Hel-Gul range, rarely higher), Hell Countess (max Ist), or monster drops in Hell areas with TC87 potential. Best reliable sources: 大量刷普通怪 in Chaos Sanctuary or Worldstone Keep, or trading. ilvl of area must support the TC.

facts.snippet:
Andariel has a base -50% Fire Resistance in all difficulties, making fire damage particularly effective against her.
Formula: Fire Resistance = -50%

Andariel's Visage is a Unique Demonhead. qlvl: 83. Key mods: +2 All Skills, 20% IAS, +25-30 Strength, Life Leech 8-10%, Level 3 Poison Nova on Hit, -30% Fire Resistance. Best in slot for many melee/hybrid builds for IAS + skills + leech combo.
Duriel is notorious for dropping multiple Town Portal scrolls, but in Hell difficulty, he remains a significant source for high-end unique jewelry and charms.

facts.snippet: The Moat Trick involves luring Mephisto to the edge of the moat in Durance of Hate Level 3, where he can be attacked from a distance while his AI fails to reach the player. This remains effective in D2R.

Bul-Kathos' Wedding Band is a Unique Ring. Key mods: +1 to All Skills, +0.5 Life per Character Level, +50 Life, 3-5% Life Stolen per Hit. qlvl: 85. Top tier ring for melee builds needing life leech and skills.
Hephasto drops the Hellforge Hammer required for the Act 4 quest. He is always Spectral Hit and has a high chance of having damaging Auras like Fanaticism or Conviction due to his boss modifiers.

When Shenk the Overseer dies, a series of catapult shots rain down on his location, killing all nearby monsters. This 'death event' is purely cosmetic for players but clears the immediate area.

facts.snippet:
To enter the Secret Cow Level, transmute Wirt's Leg and a Tome of Town Portal in the Horadric Cube while in the Rogue Encampment (Act 1).
Formula: Wirt's Leg + Tome of Town Portal = Red Portal

In Diablo II: Resurrected, killing the Cow King no longer prevents the player from opening the Secret Cow Level portal in the same difficulty. This is a significant quality-of-life change from legacy Diablo II.

Cow King's Leathers is a 3-piece set with notable MF bonus. Pieces: Cow King's Horns (War Hat), Cow King's Hide (Embossed Plate), Cow King's Hooves (Heavy Boots). 3-piece set bonus: +100% Magic Find, +5 Life per Kill. Cow King can be killed with set equipped to prevent 'killing the cow king bug' (red portal lockout). In D2R the portal lockout mechanics still apply — killing Cow King can lock out current game's portal but not future games.

facts.snippet: The Countess has a special rune drop table independent of her item drop table. In Hell, she can drop runes up to Lo, but her special table only goes up to Ist. Common source for runes below Ist.
In Hell difficulty, The Countess is always Fire and Cold Immune.

Ber (rune 30) can drop from Hell Hellforge (guaranteed Hel-Gul range, rarely higher), Hell Countess (max Ist), or monster drops in Hell areas with TC87 potential. Best reliable sources: 大量刷普通怪 in Chaos Sanctuary or Worldstone Keep, or trading. ilvl of area must support the TC.

Duriel is notorious for dropping multiple Town Portal scrolls, but in Hell difficulty, he remains a significant source for high-end unique jewelry and charms.

Bul-Kathos' Wedding Band is a Unique Ring. Key mods: +1 to All Skills, +0.5 Life per Character Level, +50 Life, 3-5% Life Stolen per Hit. qlvl: 85. Top tier ring for melee builds needing life leech and skills.
Hephasto drops the Hellforge Hammer required for the Act 4 quest. He is always Spectral Hit and has a high chance of having damaging Auras like Fanaticism or Conviction due to his boss modifiers.

When Shenk the Overseer dies, a series of catapult shots rain down on his location, killing all nearby monsters. This 'death event' is purely cosmetic for players but clears the immediate area.

facts.snippet:
To enter the Secret Cow Level, transmute Wirt's Leg and a Tome of Town Portal in the Horadric Cube while in the Rogue Encampment (Act 1).
Formula: Wirt's Leg + Tome of Town Portal = Red Portal

In Diablo II: Resurrected, killing the Cow King no longer prevents the player from opening the Secret Cow Level portal in the same difficulty. This is a significant quality-of-life change from legacy Diablo II.

Cow King's Leathers is a 3-piece set with notable MF bonus. Pieces: Cow King's Horns (War Hat), Cow King's Hide (Embossed Plate), Cow King's Hooves (Heavy Boots). 3-piece set bonus: +100% Magic Find, +5 Life per Kill. Cow King can be killed with set equipped to prevent 'killing the cow king bug' (red portal lockout). In D2R the portal lockout mechanics still apply — killing Cow King can lock out current game's portal but not future games.

facts.snippet: The Countess has a special rune drop table independent of her item drop table. In Hell, she can drop runes up to Lo, but her special table only goes up to Ist. Common source for runes below Ist.
In Hell difficulty, The Countess is always Fire and Cold Immune.

Ber (rune 30) can drop from Hell Hellforge (guaranteed Hel-Gul range, rarely higher), Hell Countess (max Ist), or monster drops in Hell areas with TC87 potential. Best reliable sources: 大量刷普通怪 in Chaos Sanctuary or Worldstone Keep, or trading. ilvl of area must support the TC.

Bul-Kathos' Wedding Band is a Unique Ring. Key mods: +1 to All Skills, +0.5 Life per Character Level, +50 Life, 3-5% Life Stolen per Hit. qlvl: 85. Top tier ring for melee builds needing life leech and skills.
Hephasto drops the Hellforge Hammer required for the Act 4 quest. He is always Spectral Hit and has a high chance of having damaging Auras like Fanaticism or Conviction due to his boss modifiers.

Pieces: Cow King's Horns (War Hat), Cow King's Hide (Embossed Plate), Cow King's Hooves (Heavy Boots). 3-piece set bonus: +100% Magic Find, +5 Life per Kill. Cow King can be killed with set equipped to prevent 'killing the cow king bug' (red portal lockout). In D2R the portal lockout mechanics still apply — killing Cow King can lock out current game's portal but not future games.

facts.snippet: The Countess has a special rune drop table independent of her item drop table. In Hell, she can drop runes up to Lo, but her special table only goes up to Ist. Common source for runes below Ist.
In Hell difficulty, The Countess is always Fire and Cold Immune.

Ber (rune 30) can drop from Hell Hellforge (guaranteed Hel-Gul range, rarely higher), Hell Countess (max Ist), or monster drops in Hell areas with TC87 potential. Best reliable sources: 大量刷普通怪 in Chaos Sanctuary or Worldstone Keep, or trading. ilvl of area must support the TC.

facts.snippet:
Andariel has a base -50% Fire Resistance in all difficulties, making fire damage particularly effective against her.
Formula: Fire Resistance = -50%

Andariel's Visage is a Unique Demonhead. qlvl: 83. Key mods: +2 All Skills, 20% IAS, +25-30 Strength, Life Leech 8-10%, Level 3 Poison Nova on Hit, -30% Fire Resistance. Best in slot for many melee/hybrid builds for IAS + skills + leech combo.
Duriel is notorious for dropping multiple Town Portal scrolls, but in Hell difficulty, he remains a significant source for high-end unique jewelry and charms.

facts.snippet: The Moat Trick involves luring Mephisto to the edge of the moat in Durance of Hate Level 3, where he can be attacked from a distance while his AI fails to reach the player. This remains effective in D2R.

Bul-Kathos' Wedding Band is a Unique Ring. Key mods: +1 to All Skills, +0.5 Life per Character Level, +50 Life, 3-5% Life Stolen per Hit. qlvl: 85. Top tier ring for melee builds needing life leech and skills.
Hephasto drops the Hellforge Hammer required for the Act 4 quest. He is always Spectral Hit and has a high chance of having damaging Auras like Fanaticism or Conviction due to his boss modifiers.

facts.snippet:
Nihlathak uses Corpse Explosion (CE) which deals 10-20% of the corpse's maximum life as Physical and Fire damage. This is the primary danger when farming him.
Formula: 50% Physical + 50% Fire damage

Nihlathak's Corpse Explosion (CE) deals 50% physical and 50% fire damage based on the corpse's base hit points. In Hell, this damage is extremely lethal. Using 'Slain Monsters Rest in Peace' (e.g., from Nature's Peace) prevents him from using it.
When Shenk the Overseer dies, a series of catapult shots rain down on his location, killing all nearby monsters. This 'death event' is purely cosmetic for players but clears the immediate area.

Nihlathak's Corpse Explosion (CE) deals 50% physical and 50% fire damage based on the corpse's base hit points. In Hell, this damage is extremely lethal. Using 'Slain Monsters Rest in Peace' (e.g., from Nature's Peace) prevents him from using it.
When Shenk the Overseer dies, a series of catapult shots rain down on his location, killing all nearby monsters. This 'death event' is purely cosmetic for players but clears the immediate area.

facts.snippet:
To enter the Secret Cow Level, transmute Wirt's Leg and a Tome of Town Portal in the Horadric Cube while in the Rogue Encampment (Act 1).
Formula: Wirt's Leg + Tome of Town Portal = Red Portal

In Diablo II: Resurrected, killing the Cow King no longer prevents the player from opening the Secret Cow Level portal in the same difficulty. This is a significant quality-of-life change from legacy Diablo II.

Cow King's Leathers is a 3-piece set with notable MF bonus. Pieces: Cow King's Horns (War Hat), Cow King's Hide (Embossed Plate), Cow King's Hooves (Heavy Boots). 3-piece set bonus: +100% Magic Find, +5 Life per Kill. Cow King can be killed with set equipped to prevent 'killing the cow king bug' (red portal lockout). In D2R the portal lockout mechanics still apply — killing Cow King can lock out current game's portal but not future games.

facts.snippet: The Countess has a special rune drop table independent of her item drop table. In Hell, she can drop runes up to Lo, but her special table only goes up to Ist. Common source for runes below Ist.
In Hell difficulty, The Countess is always Fire and Cold Immune.

Ber (rune 30) can drop from Hell Hellforge (guaranteed Hel-Gul range, rarely higher), Hell Countess (max Ist), or monster drops in Hell areas with TC87 potential. Best reliable sources: 大量刷普通怪 in Chaos Sanctuary or Worldstone Keep, or trading. ilvl of area must support the TC.

facts.snippet: The Moat Trick involves luring Mephisto to the edge of the moat in Durance of Hate Level 3, where he can be attacked from a distance while his AI fails to reach the player. This remains effective in D2R.

Bul-Kathos' Wedding Band is a Unique Ring. Key mods: +1 to All Skills, +0.5 Life per Character Level, +50 Life, 3-5% Life Stolen per Hit. qlvl: 85. Top tier ring for melee builds needing life leech and skills.
Hephasto drops the Hellforge Hammer required for the Act 4 quest. He is always Spectral Hit and has a high chance of having damaging Auras like Fanaticism or Conviction due to his boss modifiers.

Nihlathak uses Corpse Explosion (CE) which deals 10-20% of the corpse's maximum life as Physical and Fire damage. This is the primary danger when farming him.
Formula: 50% Physical + 50% Fire damage

Nihlathak's Corpse Explosion (CE) deals 50% physical and 50% fire damage based on the corpse's base hit points. In Hell, this damage is extremely lethal. Using 'Slain Monsters Rest in Peace' (e.g., from Nature's Peace) prevents him from using it.
When Shenk the Overseer dies, a series of catapult shots rain down on his location, killing all nearby monsters. This 'death event' is purely cosmetic for players but clears the immediate area.

facts.snippet:
To enter the Secret Cow Level, transmute Wirt's Leg and a Tome of Town Portal in the Horadric Cube while in the Rogue Encampment (Act 1).
Formula: Wirt's Leg + Tome of Town Portal = Red Portal

In Diablo II: Resurrected, killing the Cow King no longer prevents the player from opening the Secret Cow Level portal in the same difficulty. This is a significant quality-of-life change from legacy Diablo II.

Cow King's Leathers is a 3-piece set with notable MF bonus. Pieces: Cow King's Horns (War Hat), Cow King's Hide (Embossed Plate), Cow King's Hooves (Heavy Boots). 3-piece set bonus: +100% Magic Find, +5 Life per Kill. Cow King can be killed with set equipped to prevent 'killing the cow king bug' (red portal lockout). In D2R the portal lockout mechanics still apply — killing Cow King can lock out current game's portal but not future games.

facts.snippet: The Countess has a special rune drop table independent of her item drop table. In Hell, she can drop runes up to Lo, but her special table only goes up to Ist. Common source for runes below Ist.
In Hell difficulty, The Countess is always Fire and Cold Immune.

Ber (rune 30) can drop from Hell Hellforge (guaranteed Hel-Gul range, rarely higher), Hell Countess (max Ist), or monster drops in Hell areas with TC87 potential. Best reliable sources: 大量刷普通怪 in Chaos Sanctuary or Worldstone Keep, or trading. ilvl of area must support the TC.

facts.snippet:
Andariel has a base -50% Fire Resistance in all difficulties, making fire damage particularly effective against her.
Formula: Fire Resistance = -50%

Andariel's Visage is a Unique Demonhead. qlvl: 83. Key mods: +2 All Skills, 20% IAS, +25-30 Strength, Life Leech 8-10%, Level 3 Poison Nova on Hit, -30% Fire Resistance. Best in slot for many melee/hybrid builds for IAS + skills + leech combo.
Duriel is notorious for dropping multiple Town Portal scrolls, but in Hell difficulty, he remains a significant source for high-end unique jewelry and charms.

facts.snippet: The Moat Trick involves luring Mephisto to the edge of the moat in Durance of Hate Level 3, where he can be attacked from a distance while his AI fails to reach the player. This remains effective in D2R.

Bul-Kathos' Wedding Band is a Unique Ring. Key mods: +1 to All Skills, +0.5 Life per Character Level, +50 Life, 3-5% Life Stolen per Hit. qlvl: 85. Top tier ring for melee builds needing life leech and skills.
Hephasto drops the Hellforge Hammer required for the Act 4 quest. He is always Spectral Hit and has a high chance of having damaging Auras like Fanaticism or Conviction due to his boss modifiers.

facts.snippet:
Nihlathak uses Corpse Explosion (CE) which deals 10-20% of the corpse's maximum life as Physical and Fire damage. This is the primary danger when farming him.
Formula: 50% Physical + 50% Fire damage

Nihlathak's Corpse Explosion (CE) deals 50% physical and 50% fire damage based on the corpse's base hit points. In Hell, this damage is extremely lethal. Using 'Slain Monsters Rest in Peace' (e.g., from Nature's Peace) prevents him from using it.
When Shenk the Overseer dies, a series of catapult shots rain down on his location, killing all nearby monsters. This 'death event' is purely cosmetic for players but clears the immediate area.

facts.snippet:
To enter the Secret Cow Level, transmute Wirt's Leg and a Tome of Town Portal in the Horadric Cube while in the Rogue Encampment (Act 1).
Formula: Wirt's Leg + Tome of Town Portal = Red Portal

In Diablo II: Resurrected, killing the Cow King no longer prevents the player from opening the Secret Cow Level portal in the same difficulty. This is a significant quality-of-life change from legacy Diablo II.

Cow King's Leathers is a 3-piece set with notable MF bonus. Pieces: Cow King's Horns (War Hat), Cow King's Hide (Embossed Plate), Cow King's Hooves (Heavy Boots). 3-piece set bonus: +100% Magic Find, +5 Life per Kill. Cow King can be killed with set equipped to prevent 'killing the cow king bug' (red portal lockout). In D2R the portal lockout mechanics still apply — killing Cow King can lock out current game's portal but not future games.

facts.snippet: The Countess has a special rune drop table independent of her item drop table. In Hell, she can drop runes up to Lo, but her special table only goes up to Ist. Common source for runes below Ist.
In Hell difficulty, The Countess is always Fire and Cold Immune.

Ber (rune 30) can drop from Hell Hellforge (guaranteed Hel-Gul range, rarely higher), Hell Countess (max Ist), or monster drops in Hell areas with TC87 potential. Best reliable sources: 大量刷普通怪 in Chaos Sanctuary or Worldstone Keep, or trading. ilvl of area must support the TC.

facts.snippet:
Andariel has a base -50% Fire Resistance in all difficulties, making fire damage particularly effective against her.
Formula: Fire Resistance = -50%

Andariel's Visage is a Unique Demonhead. qlvl: 83. Key mods: +2 All Skills, 20% IAS, +25-30 Strength, Life Leech 8-10%, Level 3 Poison Nova on Hit, -30% Fire Resistance. Best in slot for many melee/hybrid builds for IAS + skills + leech combo.
Duriel is notorious for dropping multiple Town Portal scrolls, but in Hell difficulty, he remains a significant source for high-end unique jewelry and charms.

facts.snippet: The Moat Trick involves luring Mephisto to the edge of the moat in Durance of Hate Level 3, where he can be attacked from a distance while his AI fails to reach the player. This remains effective in D2R.

Bul-Kathos' Wedding Band is a Unique Ring. Key mods: +1 to All Skills, +0.5 Life per Character Level, +50 Life, 3-5% Life Stolen per Hit. qlvl: 85. Top tier ring for melee builds needing life leech and skills.
Hephasto drops the Hellforge Hammer required for the Act 4 quest. He is always Spectral Hit and has a high chance of having damaging Auras like Fanaticism or Conviction due to his boss modifiers.

facts.snippet:
Nihlathak uses Corpse Explosion (CE) which deals 10-20% of the corpse's maximum life as Physical and Fire damage. This is the primary danger when farming him.
Formula: 50% Physical + 50% Fire damage

Nihlathak's Corpse Explosion (CE) deals 50% physical and 50% fire damage based on the corpse's base hit points. In Hell, this damage is extremely lethal. Using 'Slain Monsters Rest in Peace' (e.g., from Nature's Peace) prevents him from using it.
When Shenk the Overseer dies, a series of catapult shots rain down on his location, killing all nearby monsters. This 'death event' is purely cosmetic for players but clears the immediate area.

facts.snippet:
To enter the Secret Cow Level, transmute Wirt's Leg and a Tome of Town Portal in the Horadric Cube while in the Rogue Encampment (Act 1).
Formula: Wirt's Leg + Tome of Town Portal = Red Portal

In Diablo II: Resurrected, killing the Cow King no longer prevents the player from opening the Secret Cow Level portal in the same difficulty. This is a significant quality-of-life change from legacy Diablo II.

Cow King's Leathers is a 3-piece set with notable MF bonus. Pieces: Cow King's Horns (War Hat), Cow King's Hide (Embossed Plate), Cow King's Hooves (Heavy Boots). 3-piece set bonus: +100% Magic Find, +5 Life per Kill. Cow King can be killed with set equipped to prevent 'killing the cow king bug' (red portal lockout). In D2R the portal lockout mechanics still apply — killing Cow King can lock out current game's portal but not future games.

facts.snippet: The Countess has a special rune drop table independent of her item drop table. In Hell, she can drop runes up to Lo, but her special table only goes up to Ist. Common source for runes below Ist.
In Hell difficulty, The Countess is always Fire and Cold Immune.

Ber (rune 30) can drop from Hell Hellforge (guaranteed Hel-Gul range, rarely higher), Hell Countess (max Ist), or monster drops in Hell areas with TC87 potential. Best reliable sources: 大量刷普通怪 in Chaos Sanctuary or Worldstone Keep, or trading. ilvl of area must support the TC.

facts.snippet:
Andariel has a base -50% Fire Resistance in all difficulties, making fire damage particularly effective against her.
Formula: Fire Resistance = -50%

Andariel's Visage is a Unique Demonhead. qlvl: 83. Key mods: +2 All Skills, 20% IAS, +25-30 Strength, Life Leech 8-10%, Level 3 Poison Nova on Hit, -30% Fire Resistance. Best in slot for many melee/hybrid builds for IAS + skills + leech combo.
Duriel is notorious for dropping multiple Town Portal scrolls, but in Hell difficulty, he remains a significant source for high-end unique jewelry and charms.

facts.snippet: The Moat Trick involves luring Mephisto to the edge of the moat in Durance of Hate Level 3, where he can be attacked from a distance while his AI fails to reach the player. This remains effective in D2R.

Bul-Kathos' Wedding Band is a Unique Ring. Key mods: +1 to All Skills, +0.5 Life per Character Level, +50 Life, 3-5% Life Stolen per Hit. qlvl: 85. Top tier ring for melee builds needing life leech and skills.
Hephasto drops the Hellforge Hammer required for the Act 4 quest. He is always Spectral Hit and has a high chance of having damaging Auras like Fanaticism or Conviction due to his boss modifiers.

facts.snippet:
Nihlathak uses Corpse Explosion (CE) which deals 10-20% of the corpse's maximum life as Physical and Fire damage. This is the primary danger when farming him.
Formula: 50% Physical + 50% Fire damage

Nihlathak's Corpse Explosion (CE) deals 50% physical and 50% fire damage based on the corpse's base hit points. In Hell, this damage is extremely lethal. Using 'Slain Monsters Rest in Peace' (e.g., from Nature's Peace) prevents him from using it.
When Shenk the Overseer dies, a series of catapult shots rain down on his location, killing all nearby monsters. This 'death event' is purely cosmetic for players but clears the immediate area.

facts.snippet:
To enter the Secret Cow Level, transmute Wirt's Leg and a Tome of Town Portal in the Horadric Cube while in the Rogue Encampment (Act 1).
Formula: Wirt's Leg + Tome of Town Portal = Red Portal

In Diablo II: Resurrected, killing the Cow King no longer prevents the player from opening the Secret Cow Level portal in the same difficulty. This is a significant quality-of-life change from legacy Diablo II.

Cow King's Leathers is a 3-piece set with notable MF bonus. Pieces: Cow King's Horns (War Hat), Cow King's Hide (Embossed Plate), Cow King's Hooves (Heavy Boots). 3-piece set bonus: +100% Magic Find, +5 Life per Kill. Cow King can be killed with set equipped to prevent 'killing the cow king bug' (red portal lockout). In D2R the portal lockout mechanics still apply — killing Cow King can lock out current game's portal but not future games.

facts.snippet: The Countess has a special rune drop table independent of her item drop table. In Hell, she can drop runes up to Lo, but her special table only goes up to Ist. Common source for runes below Ist.
In Hell difficulty, The Countess is always Fire and Cold Immune.

Ber (rune 30) can drop from Hell Hellforge (guaranteed Hel-Gul range, rarely higher), Hell Countess (max Ist), or monster drops in Hell areas with TC87 potential. Best reliable sources: 大量刷普通怪 in Chaos Sanctuary or Worldstone Keep, or trading. ilvl of area must support the TC.

facts.snippet:
Andariel has a base -50% Fire Resistance in all difficulties, making fire damage particularly effective against her.
Formula: Fire Resistance = -50%

Andariel's Visage is a Unique Demonhead. qlvl: 83. Key mods: +2 All Skills, 20% IAS, +25-30 Strength, Life Leech 8-10%, Level 3 Poison Nova on Hit, -30% Fire Resistance. Best in slot for many melee/hybrid builds for IAS + skills + leech combo.
Duriel is notorious for dropping multiple Town Portal scrolls, but in Hell difficulty, he remains a significant source for high-end unique jewelry and charms.

facts.snippet: The Moat Trick involves luring Mephisto to the edge of the moat in Durance of Hate Level 3, where he can be attacked from a distance while his AI fails to reach the player. This remains effective in D2R.

Bul-Kathos' Wedding Band is a Unique Ring. Key mods: +1 to All Skills, +0.5 Life per Character Level, +50 Life, 3-5% Life Stolen per Hit. qlvl: 85. Top tier ring for melee builds needing life leech and skills.
Hephasto drops the Hellforge Hammer required for the Act 4 quest. He is always Spectral Hit and has a high chance of having damaging Auras like Fanaticism or Conviction due to his boss modifiers.

facts.snippet:
Nihlathak uses Corpse Explosion (CE) which deals 10-20% of the corpse's maximum life as Physical and Fire damage. This is the primary danger when farming him.
Formula: 50% Physical + 50% Fire damage

Nihlathak's Corpse Explosion (CE) deals 50% physical and 50% fire damage based on the corpse's base hit points. In Hell, this damage is extremely lethal. Using 'Slain Monsters Rest in Peace' (e.g., from Nature's Peace) prevents him from using it.
When Shenk the Overseer dies, a series of catapult shots rain down on his location, killing all nearby monsters. This 'death event' is purely cosmetic for players but clears the immediate area.

facts.snippet:
To enter the Secret Cow Level, transmute Wirt's Leg and a Tome of Town Portal in the Horadric Cube while in the Rogue Encampment (Act 1).
Formula: Wirt's Leg + Tome of Town Portal = Red Portal

In Diablo II: Resurrected, killing the Cow King no longer prevents the player from opening the Secret Cow Level portal in the same difficulty. This is a significant quality-of-life change from legacy Diablo II.

Cow King's Leathers is a 3-piece set with notable MF bonus. Pieces: Cow King's Horns (War Hat), Cow King's Hide (Embossed Plate), Cow King's Hooves (Heavy Boots). 3-piece set bonus: +100% Magic Find, +5 Life per Kill. Cow King can be killed with set equipped to prevent 'killing the cow king bug' (red portal lockout). In D2R the portal lockout mechanics still apply — killing Cow King can lock out current game's portal but not future games.

facts.snippet: The Countess has a special rune drop table independent of her item drop table. In Hell, she can drop runes up to Lo, but her special table only goes up to Ist. Common source for runes below Ist.
In Hell difficulty, The Countess is always Fire and Cold Immune.

Ber (rune 30) can drop from Hell Hellforge (guaranteed Hel-Gul range, rarely higher), Hell Countess (max Ist), or monster drops in Hell areas with TC87 potential. Best reliable sources: 大量刷普通怪 in Chaos Sanctuary or Worldstone Keep, or trading. ilvl of area must support the TC.

Duriel is notorious for dropping multiple Town Portal scrolls, but in Hell difficulty, he remains a significant source for high-end unique jewelry and charms.

facts.snippet: The Moat Trick involves luring Mephisto to the edge of the moat in Durance of Hate Level 3, where he can be attacked from a distance while his AI fails to reach the player. This remains effective in D2R.

Hephasto drops the Hellforge Hammer required for the Act 4 quest. He is always Spectral Hit and has a high chance of having damaging Auras like Fanaticism or Conviction due to his boss modifiers.

facts.snippet:
Nihlathak uses Corpse Explosion (CE) which deals 10-20% of the corpse's maximum life as Physical and Fire damage. This is the primary danger when farming him.
Formula: 50% Physical + 50% Fire damage

Nihlathak's Corpse Explosion (CE) deals 50% physical and 50% fire damage based on the corpse's base hit points. In Hell, this damage is extremely lethal. Using 'Slain Monsters Rest in Peace' (e.g., from Nature's Peace) prevents him from using it.
When Shenk the Overseer dies, a series of catapult shots rain down on his location, killing all nearby monsters. This 'death event' is purely cosmetic for players but clears the immediate area.

facts.snippet:
To enter the Secret Cow Level, transmute Wirt's Leg and a Tome of Town Portal in the Horadric Cube while in the Rogue Encampment (Act 1).
Formula: Wirt's Leg + Tome of Town Portal = Red Portal

In Diablo II: Resurrected, killing the Cow King no longer prevents the player from opening the Secret Cow Level portal in the same difficulty. This is a significant quality-of-life change from legacy Diablo II.

Cow King's Leathers is a 3-piece set with notable MF bonus. Pieces: Cow King's Horns (War Hat), Cow King's Hide (Embossed Plate), Cow King's Hooves (Heavy Boots). 3-piece set bonus: +100% Magic Find, +5 Life per Kill. Cow King can be killed with set equipped to prevent 'killing the cow king bug' (red portal lockout). In D2R the portal lockout mechanics still apply — killing Cow King can lock out current game's portal but not future games.
